description: Chinese - Erlang Shen is a deity in chinese mythology.

keyMyths.title: Splitting Mount Tao
keyMyths.description: Erlang Shen, born from a mortal woman and a god, split Mount Tao with an axe to rescue his mother who was imprisoned there for marrying a mortal. This act demonstrated his filial piety and immense strength.

keyMyths.title: The Battle Against the Monkey King
keyMyths.description: Erlang Shen engaged in an epic battle with Sun Wukong, the Monkey King, showcasing his incredible martial prowess, shapeshifting abilities, and divine weapons. Their fight tested each other's skills and cunning, ultimately leading to Sun Wukong's capture.

keyMyths.title: Guardian of Heaven
keyMyths.description: Erlang Shen serves as a powerful general in the Heavenly Court, often tasked with maintaining order and suppressing demons and other threats to the celestial realm. He is fiercely loyal and an effective warrior.

keyMyths.title: The Third Eye's Power
keyMyths.description: Erlang Shen possesses a third eye in the center of his forehead, granting him enhanced vision, the ability to see through deception, and powerful magical abilities. This eye is a symbol of his divine insight and power.
keyMyths.source: Various folk tales and theatrical performances

keyMyths.title: Hunting Monsters and Demons
keyMyths.description: Erlang Shen is renowned for his skill in hunting and subduing various monsters and demons that plague the mortal realm. He is often invoked for protection against evil spirits and calamities.
